title: cissampelos pareira var. crenata
intro: Cissampelos pareira var. crenata, also known as the Kali Musali, is a plant species native to tropical regions, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant's health benefits include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as supporting liver and kidney function. In herbal preparations, Cissampelos pareira var. crenata is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and powder, and it is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
